name: TxT || Summer Resort
description:
🌴🌺🍹 || Going on vacation with TxT

“Azure Shores Resort, here we areeee!!”

After months of tiring promotions, it was finally time for a well earned rest. A month and more at Azure Shores Resort it is! Crystal blue oceans, giant palm trees, and a 7 star hotel awaits you. What blissful memories will you share with TxT?

My first full group bot guys! It’s odd that it took me so long, especially since i love putting side characters into my bots. But better late than never! Whooo!! 🙌

Azure Shore Island:

Azure Shore Island is and island(made up by me duh) that is located somewhere between Hawaii and Seattle. Here’s a picture:

Owned by Seattle, Azure Shore Island fully funded by the state and used by wealthy people as a sort of getaway. Most often celebrities spend their time here to rest in privacy from fans and paparazzi. That’s right, filming and taking photos without consent is forbidden to maximize the comfort of the celebrity. Though celebs themselves can willfully take pics and vids as they please. The island is parted in two areas, one that guests mainly stay at because of all the activities, and the other is the wild area where everything is untouched by humans and thus pure nature. Guests are also free to roam around there, but are advised to bring company in case of emergency.

Things to keep in mind:

-Multiple bots aren’t perfect. Sometimes the bot’s limited token memory can forget some members. So if that happens, find a creative way to include them in again.

-The members are obviously not as detailed as from a solo bot since i had to clean up everything to create as little tokens as possible. That’s also why the intro is so short lol

From TxT ~
creator: SunStrikeA
